title: Nether again!
description:
This is a mod, that will come with a collection of several other mods, which will work together to make the game as difficult as i can!
You can contact me in my official discord:
https://discord.gg/7Ks8cgVcxD if you have found a bug!
body:
Nether again and its many child mods (to come) aim to make minecraft as difficult as possible!
there are many things this mod changes and things this mod adds! such as: firestarter. the firestarter will start fires (as you could of guessed) which works in tandum with the fireholder! which as you could guess, holds the fire. this all works to warm the player at night! when it gets particularily cold! this and much more is waiting for you in this mod!
You can contact me in my official discord:
https://discord.gg/7Ks8cgVcxD if you have found a bug! or want to chat with the community!
